# ShitClaude

> Local-first Claude and Codex region profile scanner. It estimates how strongly browser and IP signals point to non-US regional usage.

## Key Pages

- [Scanner](https://shitclaude.site/zh/): Main Claude / Codex region profile scanner.
- [Methodology](https://shitclaude.site/methodology/): Explanation of the 14 weighted browser and IP signals.
- [Privacy Policy](https://shitclaude.site/privacy/): Local-first privacy model, IP lookup, and advertising disclosure.

## Notes

ShitClaude is not affiliated with Anthropic, Claude, OpenAI, or Codex. Scores are educational estimates, not official provider risk decisions.
